name: AmraniAds — RC Premier Contact (Meta Cloud API)

meta._comment: BEFORE ACTIVATING: set env vars WA_PHONE_NUMBER_ID, WA_ACCESS_TOKEN, OPENAI_API_KEY, RENTALCARS_SCRIPT_URL. Create WhatsApp template 'rc_premier_contact' in Meta Business Manager with 2 variables: {{1}} = prénom, {{2}} = message AI.
